return(function(s,j,t,F,c,E,B,q,a,G,U,N,V,m,x,D,h,H,o,T,l,i,A,O)O,a,T,H,V,h,x,D,N,A,m,U,q,o,i,G,l=function(s,K)local j=N(K)local t=function(t,F,c,E,B,h,T,A)return q(s,{t,F;c,E,B,h;T;A},K,j)end return return D end,function(s)local K,q=-598879-(-598880),s[762335-762334]while q do T[q],K=T[q]-(-902033+902034),(-1031173-(-1031174))+K if-957598-(-957598)==T[q]then T[q],h[q]=nil,nil end q=s[K]end end,function(s,K)local j=N(K)local t=function()return q(s,{},K,j)end return t end,function(q,t,F,c)local g,Y,ly,Ny,iy,T,ay,G,Vy,r,n,C,k,v,S,oy,cy,W,B,d,b,Fy,By,Gy,R,u,xy,X,jy,m,p,Hy,Ey,w,Ay,gy,N,Ky,I,hy,e,f,Ty,y,ty,Oy,J,my,P,Dy,Uy,M,z,Q,sy,Z,qy,L,D while q do if q<8144850-760064 then if return t end,function(s)T[s]=T[s]-(248667-248666)if T[s]==-364091-(-364091)then T[s],h[s]=nil,nil end end,function(s,K)local j=N(K)local t=function(...)return q(s,{...},K,j)end return t end,function(s,K)local j=N(K)local t=function(t,F,c,E,B,h)return q(s,{t;F,c,E;B;h},K,j)end return t end return(G(-466371+14823475,{}))(j(B))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[K(413447+-424025)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
